projects.name: Client-Side Proving (CSP)
projects.shortDescription: Benchmark ZKP systems, bridge ecosystem gaps, push toward PQ-sound on-chain verification.

projects.name: Mopro
projects.shortDescription: Mobile-first proving infrastructure. Native provers for Swift/Kotlin/RN/Flutter. GPU crypto libraries.

projects.name: zkID
projects.shortDescription: Privacy-preserving identity proofs. OpenAC wallet unit aligned with EUDI. ZK-friendly primitives.

projects.name: TLSNotary
projects.shortDescription: Cryptographic proofs of web data authenticity using TLS and MPC. On track toward 1.0 release.

projects.name: Machina iO
projects.shortDescription: Practical indistinguishability obfuscation. Noise refreshing, blind PRF over key-homomorphic encodings.

projects.name: Private Transfers (Research)
projects.shortDescription: Plasmablind, Sonobe folding library, Wormholes v2, one-time programs and stealth mixers.

projects.name: Private Transfers (Engineering)
projects.shortDescription: Benchmark protocols, prototype L2 precompiles, gas analysis, specify native shielded pools.

projects.name: IPTF
projects.shortDescription: Institutional Privacy Task Force. PoCs, architecture reviews, workshops, market map.

projects.name: PIR
projects.shortDescription: PIR schemes tailored for Ethereum state and history. Optimized for wallets, frontends, tax software, dApps.

projects.name: UBT
projects.shortDescription: Provably L1-equivalent EL node using UBT data structure. MPT-equivalent.

projects.name: tor-js
projects.shortDescription: Arti Tor client in-browser for anonymized RPC. Kohaku integration for plug-in anonymous routing in wallets and frontends.

scorecards.summary: Initial assessment based on public sources: pse.dev, GitHub repos, HackMD, project docs, and license (MIT/Apache-2.0). Tier 1: CROPS pass (open source, forkable, no kill switches). Tier 2/3: differentiated by maturity, documentation, and ecosystem diffusion.
